metadata.description: Hospital FAQ Knowledge Base for RAG
metadata.compliance: All information verified by Hospital Administration

questions: When can I meet the patient?
visiting_hours.answer: Visiting hours are 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM and 4:00 PM to 7:00 PM daily. Only 2 visitors are allowed per patient at a time. Please carry a valid ID proof.

questions: Where do I pay the bill?
billing_counter.answer: The billing counter is located on the Ground Floor, near the main entrance. It is open 24/7 for emergency billing. Regular hours: 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

emergency_services.answer: Yes, Emergency Services are available 24/7 at Gate 1. Ambulance services can be reached at 108 or our hospital number 040-1234-5678.

questions: How do I reschedule my appointment?
appointment_reschedule.answer: To reschedule an appointment, please call 1800-123-4567 or visit the reception desk. Rescheduling must be done at least 24 hours before the scheduled time to avoid charges.

questions: What documents are needed for insurance?
insurance_claims.answer: For insurance claims, please carry: (1) Valid ID Proof, (2) Insurance Policy Card, (3) Doctor's Prescription, (4) Previous Medical Records. Cashless approval takes 2-4 hours.

questions: How do I collect my lab report?
When will my test results be ready?
report_collection.answer: Lab reports are available within 24-48 hours. You can collect them from the Reception Desk (Ground Floor) or download from our patient portal. Bring your UHID card for collection.

questions: Where can I park my vehicle?
parking_facility.answer: Yes, we have a multi-level parking facility. Charges: ₹50 for 2-wheeler, ₹100 for 4-wheeler (first 4 hours). Free parking for emergency cases.

pharmacy_hours.answer: The hospital pharmacy is located on the Ground Floor and is open 24/7. We also have an external pharmacy near Gate 2 open from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM.

dietary_services.answer: Outside food is allowed but should be homemade and hygienic. The hospital provides dietary meals for admitted patients as per doctor's prescription. Cafeteria is open 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM.

questions: Do I need a visitor pass?
visitor_pass.answer: Yes, all visitors must register at the security desk and obtain a visitor pass. Please carry a valid government ID (Aadhaar, Driving License, etc.).

wheelchair_service.answer: Wheelchairs are available free of charge at the main entrance. Please deposit a refundable amount of ₹500 or leave your ID card. Return within 2 hours.

discharge_process.answer: Discharge process takes 2-3 hours after doctor's approval. You need to clear all bills at the billing counter and collect discharge summary, prescriptions, and reports from the nursing station.

questions: Can I get a second opinion?
second_opinion.answer: Yes, second opinion consultations are available. Please book an appointment through our helpline 1800-123-4567. Bring all previous medical records and reports.

questions: Do you offer health checkup packages?
health_checkup.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive health checkup packages starting from ₹1,500. Packages include basic, standard, and premium options. Call 1800-123-4567 for booking.

vaccination_services.answer: Yes, vaccination services are available for children and adults. Timings: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. No appointment needed for routine vaccines.

ambulance_service.answer: Ambulance can be booked by calling 108 (government) or 040-1234-5678 (hospital). Charges: ₹500 within city limits, ₹10/km beyond. ICU ambulance available for critical patients.

online_consultation.answer: Yes, online consultation is available through our patient portal and mobile app. Charges: ₹300 for general consultation, ₹500 for specialist. Available 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

questions: How to get old medical records?
medical_records.answer: To request old medical records, submit a written application at the Medical Records Department (1st Floor). Processing time: 3-5 working days. Fee: ₹100 per page.

questions: Where do I file a complaint?
complaint_feedback.answer: Complaints can be filed at the Patient Relations Desk (Ground Floor) or via email at feedback@hospital.com. We respond within 48 hours. Helpline: 1800-123-4567.

questions: What are the COVID safety measures?
covid_protocol.answer: Masks are recommended in clinical areas. RT-PCR testing is available from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM (Report in 24 hours). Rapid Antigen Test available 24/7 (Report in 1 hour).
